creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know that there’s a @louisvuitton café in London? It’s called Café Alma and it’s on the first floor the Louis Vuitton Hotel pop-up in Berkeley Square. Book a table online or try your luck for a walk-in table! You can book a table for coffee, lunch or afternoon tea and the vibes are immaculate, as you would expect!

🎟️ We both went to the Sweet Moments menu which includes 1 coffee/tea and one cake for £26 each
🍪 We also got a box of 4 takeaway LV biscuits for £26

Share this with someone who would love to go!
📍 28 Berkeley Square, London W1J 6EN
🗓️ Available from 11am to 3pm, the Café Alma signature luncheon presents a two-course, seasonal offer. The Afternoon Tea for two with playful British patisseries is served between 3pm and 7pm, Monday to Saturday and all-day Sunday.

transcription.text: I would describe a Louis Vuitton woman as very strong. Very powerful.
